response.justification: While James is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in testing, high-scale microservices, and recent AI infrastructure, he lacks the specialized domain expertise required for this IC6 role. A Principal Engineer in Growth and Experimentation must have deep experience architecting A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, and telemetry foundations, none of which are demonstrated in his resume.
strengths: Over 15 years of engineering experience, including designing high-scale microservices handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby).
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, directly aligning with preferred AI qualifications.
Strong dedication to software craftsmanship, testing (TDD, custom test runners), and mentoring engineers (Refactoring Dojos).
concerns: Complete absence of experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or growth measurement tools.
No demonstrated background in statistical methods, data analysis, or rollout-risk management required for the role.
Lacks clear evidence of driving cross-organizational technical strategy at a Principal (IC6) level within an enterprise environment.
